acds_session_join_result_t(3) Library Functions Manual acds_session_join_result_t(3)

NAME

acds_session_join_result_t - Session join result.

SYNOPSIS

#include <include/ascii-chat/network/acip/acds_client.h>

Data Fields


bool success
Join succeeded. uint8_t participant_id [16]
Participant UUID (if success). uint8_t session_id [16]
Session UUID (if success). uint8_t error_code
Error code (if !success). char error_message [129]
Error message (if !success, null-terminated). uint8_t session_type
acds_session_type_t: 0=DIRECT_TCP, 1=WEBRTC (if success) char server_address [65]
Server IP/hostname (if success, null-terminated). uint16_t server_port
Server port (if success).

Detailed Description

Session join result.

Server connection information is ONLY included after successful authentication. This prevents IP address leakage to unauthenticated clients.

Definition at line 245 of file acds_client.h.
